raw_consumer_statement:
Request for Full Refund - Account Ending In XXXX Reference Number : XXXX To Whom It May Concern, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request your assistance in securing a full refund for an authorized charge on my account ending in XXXX. The reference number for this request is XXXX. 

The details of this dispute are as follows : - Merchant Name : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - Transaction Amount : {$440.00} - Transaction Date : XX/XX/XXXX  While I acknowledge that this charge was initially authorized, I believe that I am entitled to a full refund based on relevant aviation laws and regulations. I kindly request that you review this case in light of these regulations and take the necessary steps to facilitate the refund. 

I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and thank you for your cooperation in helping me secure the refund to which I believe I am entitled under aviation laws. 

Sincerely, XXXX
